channel.title: Wyoming on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Wyoming on ExitCode0

item.title: Setting up Wyoming Piper with Docker Compose
item.description: Deploy Wyoming Piper text-to-speech in Docker for Home Assistant. Enable local voice output with Rhasspy integration and multiple language and voice model support.

item.title: How to Use a Docker Compose File for Wyoming Whisper
item.description: Run Whisper speech-to-text in Docker for local Home Assistant voice assistant. Configure Wyoming Whisper with a lightweight model for fast local speech recognition.
